scripts.build: bun run --filter './packages/*' build && bun run --filter './apps/*' build
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.docker:dev:restart: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
scripts.test: bun run --filter './packages/*' test && bun run --filter './apps/*' test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter './packages/*' typecheck && bun run --filter './apps/*' typecheck
